transcript: Speaker A: ओ, तू मराठी आहेस? [Oh, are you Marathi?] Speaker B: हो. [Yes.] Speaker A: तू पुण्यावरून बोलतोस म्हणून विचारलं. [I asked because you are speaking from Pune.] Speaker B: बरोबर, मग इथे किती दिवसांपासून आहेस? [Right, so how many days have you been here?] Speaker A: आज तिसरा दिवस आहे. [Today is the third day.] Speaker B: पण तरी चांगलं बोलतेस इंग्लिश. [But still you speak English well.] Speaker A: कारण इथे रोज बोलायची सवय लागते आणि मज्जा पण येते. [Because here you get the habit of speaking daily and it's fun too.] Speaker B: हो, इंग्लिश क्लासेस पेक्षा जास्त युजफुल वाटतंय. [Yes, it feels more useful than English classes.] Speaker C: MySivi ॲपवर १ कोटी लोक स्पोकन इंग्लिशची प्रॅक्टिस करतात. तुम्ही पण आजच सुरू करा. ट्रायल फक्त १ रुपयात. [On MySivi app, 1 crore people practice spoken English. You also start today. Trial for just 1 rupee.]
on_screen_text: MySivi, Start English Learning - MySivi, 10M+ Downloads, MySivi Premium, LIMITED TIME OFFER, ₹1, Autopay, cancel anytime, 1,200 learners purchased today, 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access
summary: Two Marathi speakers discuss how practicing English on the MySivi app is highly effective and fun. The ad highlights the app's 10M+ downloads and promotes a trial offer for just 1 rupee.
